title: CI/CD Configuration Schema
description: Schema for validating cicd.json configuration files for AWS Lambda/API Gateway/SNS deployments

app.description: Application name used for resource naming and versioning

account.description: AWS account ID (12-digit number). Optional — when set, acts as a safety pin that must match the credentials' actual account.

region.description: AWS region for deployments. Optional — falls back to AWS_REGION, AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, then the active AWS profile.

repo.description: GitHub repository in owner/repo format for deployment tracking via gh CLI

fargate.description: Fargate/ECS configuration (required when computeMode is fargate)

cluster.description: ECS cluster ARN or name. Supports !ImportValue resolution.

containerName.description: Container name within the task definition to update

httpApi.description: HTTP API (API Gateway V2) ID for custom domain mappings. Supports !ImportValue resolution.

environment.description: Global environment variables for all Lambda functions. Supports !ImportValue, !ParameterStore, and !SetEnv prefixes

environmentGroups.description: Named groups of environment variable names. Functions can reference groups with @groupName in their env field (e.g., '@twilio,DDB_TABLE')

throttle.description: Global default API Gateway throttle settings for all stages and APIs (can be overridden at stage or API level)

workers.description: Standalone Lambda functions that have no managed trigger (no API Gateway, SNS, or SQS binding). They receive stage env vars and are versioned with each deployment so they aren't cleaned up.

exports.description: Array of API Gateway, SNS, SQS, and web (S3/CloudFront) resources to manage

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the API Gateway REST API ID

prefix.description: Optional path prefix prepended to this API's path (e.g., 'admin' yields '/admin/{path}'). Used to group APIs under a shared URL segment via API Gateway base path mappings. May contain '/' for nested prefixes (e.g., 'internal/admin'). No leading or trailing slashes.

functions.description: Lambda functions to integrate with this API

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the SNS topic ARN

stages.description: Stages where this SNS topic should be configured

functions.description: Lambda functions to subscribe to this topic

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the SQS queue ARN

stages.description: Stages where this SQS queue should be configured

functions.description: Lambda functions to trigger from this queue

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the S3 bucket name

distribution.description: CloudFormation export name for the CloudFront distribution ID

stages.description: Stages where this web deployment should run (defaults to all stages)

source.description: Local source directory to upload (defaults to ./dist)

noindexStages.description: Stages where cicd injects a Disallow:/ robots.txt overriding any source robots.txt

plugins.description: Plugin module names to load at runtime (e.g., @abwaters/cicd-plugin-twilio). Each plugin can contribute its own stages[] schema fragment.

stages.description: Deployment stages with custom domain mappings and environment overrides

mapping.description: Custom domain mapping for API Gateway

path.description: Base path mapping (empty string for root)

cloudfront.description: Serve this stage's API Gateway REST APIs through an existing CloudFront distribution at a path prefix (e.g. /api), instead of (or alongside) a custom domain. The distribution's API origin and cache behavior are owned by CloudFormation; cicd only validates (drift-check) and invalidates. Run `cicd cloudfront <stage>` to generate the required CloudFormation.

distribution.description: CloudFormation export name resolving to the CloudFront distribution ID for this stage

path.description: Path-prefix segment APIs are served under (e.g. 'api' → /api/*). Defaults to 'api'.

invalidate.description: Invalidate the mapped path on the distribution after deploy (default true)

cachePolicy.description: Optional expected CloudFront cache policy id/name, validated by the drift-check only (cicd never sets it)

environment.description: Stage-specific environment variable overrides. Supports !ImportValue, !ParameterStore, and !SetEnv prefixes

throttle.description: Default API Gateway throttle settings for all APIs in this stage (can be overridden per-API)

service.description: ECS service name for this stage (required in fargate mode)

taskFamily.description: ECS task definition family name for this stage (required in fargate mode)

httpApi.description: HTTP API ID or !ImportValue reference for API Gateway V2 custom domain mapping (required in fargate mode)

cpu.description: Fargate task CPU units (e.g., 256, 512, 1024). Overrides the current task definition value.

memory.description: Fargate task memory in MiB (e.g., 512, 1024, 2048). Must be a valid combination with cpu.

production.description: Marks this stage as a production environment: sets production_environment on the GitHub deployment and requires confirmation before deploy/rollback (bypass with --force).

apiFunctionConfig.description: API Gateway Lambda function configuration (requires HTTP method)

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the Lambda function ARN

env.description: Comma-separated list of environment variable names from global or stage environment

concurrency.description: Reserved concurrent executions for this Lambda function (0 for throttling)

snsFunctionConfig.description: SNS topic Lambda function configuration (method is accepted but not used)

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the Lambda function ARN

method.description: Accepted for backwards compatibility but not used for SNS functions

env.description: Comma-separated list of environment variable names from global or stage environment

concurrency.description: Reserved concurrent executions for this Lambda function (0 for throttling)

workerFunctionConfig.description: Standalone Lambda function configuration (no trigger wired by this tool)

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the Lambda function ARN

env.description: Comma-separated list of environment variable names from global or stage environment

concurrency.description: Reserved concurrent executions for this Lambda function (0 for throttling)

stages.description: Stages where this worker should be deployed (defaults to all stages)

name.description: CloudFormation export name for the Lambda function ARN

env.description: Comma-separated list of environment variable names from global or stage environment

concurrency.description: Reserved concurrent executions for this Lambda function (0 for throttling)

batchSize.description: Maximum number of records sent to the function in each batch

maximumBatchingWindowInSeconds.description: Maximum amount of time to gather records before invoking the function

maximumConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent invocations from this event source
